headline: ENSG Tops Q1 EPS Estimates on Patient Growth, Raises '26 Outlook
summary: Ensign Group tops Q1 EPS estimates as occupancy gains and acquisitions fuel growth, while higher costs and a slight revenue miss temper results.

raw.headline: ENSG Tops Q1 EPS Estimates on Patient Growth, Raises '26 Outlook

headline: Pediatrix Medical Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Same-Unit Strength
summary: Pediatrix Medical Group tops Q1 estimates as stronger reimbursements and same-unit gains lift results despite lower patient volumes.

raw.headline: Pediatrix Medical Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Same-Unit Strength
raw.summary: Pediatrix Medical Group tops Q1 estimates as stronger reimbursements and same-unit gains lift results despite lower patient volumes.

headline: Magnus Expands Access to 5-Day SAINT® Depression Therapy as Leading Health Systems Scale Nationwide Adoption
summary: BURLINGAME, Calif., May 05, 2026--Magnus Medical Inc., a pioneer in precision neuromodulation for brain health conditions, today announced growing commercial momentum as availability and access to its breakthrough SAINT® Depression Therapy increase, driven by expanding adoption among leading health systems, payer reimbursement, and patient demand.
